# Depikt

> Depikt turns rough ideas into production-grade AI image prompts for OpenAI's GPT Image 2. Browse 500 curated prompts, generate new ones from a sentence, critique your own prompts, or look up one-question answer recipes. Free, no login.

## Core tools

- [Prompt Library](https://depikt.app/library): Browse 500 curated, ready-to-ship AI image prompts across 10 categories (posters, infographics, UI mockups, social posts, cinematic, product, illustrations, image edits, multi-panel, and more).
- [Prompt Generator](https://depikt.app/generate): Paste a rough idea, get back a structured production-grade prompt with category, settings, and a "why it works" explanation.
- [Prompt Critique](https://depikt.app/critique): Paste any prompt, get a score, list of weaknesses, concrete improvements, and a rewritten version.
- [Reference Gallery](https://depikt.app/gallery): Browse hand-picked reference images. Click any image to start a prompt from it.

## Prompt Recipes — one question, one prompt

Each recipe answers one specific question with a single copy-paste prompt. Designed to be cited directly.

- [Prompt Recipes index](https://depikt.app/recipes): Full list of one-question prompt recipes.
- [Prompt for a minimalist startup logo poster](https://depikt.app/recipes/minimalist-startup-logo-poster)
- [Prompt for a 3-panel vertical storyboard](https://depikt.app/recipes/3-panel-storyboard-vertical)
- [Prompt for an Instagram quote card](https://depikt.app/recipes/instagram-quote-card)
- [Prompt for a clean SaaS dashboard mockup](https://depikt.app/recipes/saas-dashboard-mockup)
- [Prompt for a cinematic golden-hour portrait](https://depikt.app/recipes/cinematic-portrait-golden-hour)
- [Prompt for a 3-step process infographic](https://depikt.app/recipes/infographic-3-step-process)
- [Prompt for a minimalist product packshot](https://depikt.app/recipes/minimalist-product-packshot)
- [Prompt for a mobile app onboarding screen](https://depikt.app/recipes/mobile-onboarding-screen)
- [Prompt for an editorial magazine cover](https://depikt.app/recipes/editorial-magazine-cover)
- [Prompt for an isometric tech illustration](https://depikt.app/recipes/isometric-tech-illustration)

## How-to guides for GPT Image 2

Each guide answers one concrete prompting question with a TL;DR, a working template, and an explanation of why each part matters.

- [How to prompt GPT Image 2 for posters with text](https://depikt.app/blog/how-to-prompt-gpt-image-2-for-posters)
- [How to prompt GPT Image 2 for infographics and diagrams](https://depikt.app/blog/how-to-prompt-gpt-image-2-for-infographics)
- [How to prompt GPT Image 2 for UI mockups](https://depikt.app/blog/how-to-prompt-gpt-image-2-for-ui-mockups)
- [How to prompt GPT Image 2 for storyboards and multi-panel scenes](https://depikt.app/blog/how-to-prompt-gpt-image-2-for-storyboards)
- [How to prompt GPT Image 2 for product shots](https://depikt.app/blog/how-to-prompt-gpt-image-2-for-product-shots)
- [Aspect ratios for AI images: which to use for what](https://depikt.app/blog/ai-image-aspect-ratios-guide-gpt-image-2)
- [AI image prompt vocabulary cheat sheet (camera, lighting, composition)](https://depikt.app/blog/ai-image-prompt-vocabulary-cheat-sheet)
- [The AI image prompt framework](https://depikt.app/blog/ai-image-prompt-framework)
- [How to prompt AI image generators](https://depikt.app/blog/how-to-prompt-ai-image-generators)
- [AI image prompts with readable text](https://depikt.app/blog/ai-image-prompts-with-text)
- [Common AI image prompt mistakes](https://depikt.app/blog/ai-image-prompt-mistakes)

## Comparisons and alternatives

- [Free alternative to PromptBase for GPT Image 2](https://depikt.app/blog/free-alternative-to-promptbase-for-gpt-image-2)
- [Best free AI image prompt generator in 2026](https://depikt.app/blog/best-free-ai-image-prompt-generator-2026)
- [Depikt vs PromptHero for GPT Image 2](https://depikt.app/blog/depikt-vs-prompthero-for-gpt-image-2)
- [GPT Image 2 vs Nano Banana vs Midjourney](https://depikt.app/blog/gpt-image-2-vs-nano-banana-vs-midjourney)
- [GPT Image 2 prompt examples](https://depikt.app/blog/gpt-image-2-prompt-examples)
- [ChatGPT image prompt tips](https://depikt.app/blog/chatgpt-image-prompt-tips)
- [AI image editing: change, preserve, match](https://depikt.app/blog/ai-image-editing-change-preserve-match)

## Writing

- [Blog](https://depikt.app/blog): Field-tested techniques for getting better AI images. Frameworks, examples, model comparisons.

## About

- Built for designers, marketers, indie founders, and creative engineers who want sharp prompts without spending an hour iterating.
- Free to use. No login required.
- Contact: hi@depikt.app
